channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: 'House of the Dragon,' Season 3, Episode 5: A not-so-secret door is just a door
item.description: We finally find Aemond. Meanwhile, Alicent and Helaena are doing a little too well trying not to be found.
item.content:encoded:
We finally find Aemond. Meanwhile, Alicent and Helaena are doing a little too well trying not to be found.

(Image credit: Ollie Upton)
item.dc:creator: Glen Weldon

item.title: A cavalcade of international stars headlined the World Cup's first-ever halftime final show
item.description: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise.
item.content:encoded:
With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise.

(Image credit: Mauro Pimentel)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Who is Andy Burnham, the U.K.'s new prime minister?
item.description: On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Burnham's politics have been shaped by England's north-south class divide.
item.content:encoded:
On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Burnham's politics have been shaped by England's north-south class divide.

(Image credit: Carl Court)
item.dc:creator: Lauren Frayer

item.title: Violence repeatedly erupts in dementia care despite warnings, inspections show
item.description: Nursing homes and assisted living facilities can be fertile ground for violence between residents with dementia, including fatal assaults. Court records and inspecitions how safeguards fall short.
item.content:encoded:
Nursing homes and assisted living facilities can be fertile ground for violence between residents with dementia, including fatal assaults. Court records and inspecitions how safeguards fall short.

(Image credit: Marco Cecchetto)
item.dc:creator: Jordan Rau

item.title: An Israeli paraglider tries to save migrating swifts that nest in the Western Wall
item.description: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them.
item.content:encoded:
Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them.

(Image credit: Ruth Sherlock)
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: Deadly overnight Russian attack on Ukraine targets the capital
item.description: Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones across Ukraine overnight, according to the Ukrainian air force.
item.content:encoded:
Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones across Ukraine overnight, according to the Ukrainian air force.

(Image credit: Efrem Lukatsky)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 5 clever design tricks to make a small home look bigger
item.description: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets.
item.content:encoded:
Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets.

(Image credit: Andee Tagle/NPR)
item.dc:creator: Andee Tagle

item.title: Cuban artist and dissident exiled from country after 5 years in prison arrives in US
item.description: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country.
item.content:encoded:
A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country.

(Image credit: David Santiago)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: MLS works to bring in a new generation of fans as the World Cup comes to an end
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?
item.content:encoded:
In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?

(Image credit: Ethan Swope)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Spain is the 2026 World Cup champion, defeating Argentina for its 2nd title
item.description: Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.
item.content:encoded:
Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.

(Image credit: David Ramos)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan
